units.source_text: 1 ⾃2023年1⽉1⽉起，我們以IFRS 17「保單」取代IFRS 4「保單」。截⾄2022年12⽉31⽇⽌財政年度的比較數字已相應重列。截⾄2021年12⽉31⽇⽌年度的比較
units.translation_target_text: 1 From January 1, 2023, we will replace IFRS 4 "Policy" with IFRS 17 "Policy". Comparative figures for the financial year ended December 31, 2022 have been restated accordingly. Comparison for the year ended December 31, 2021

units.translation_target_text: 2 In 2025, amounts include a mark-to-market gain of US$100 million on the interest rate hedging of the retained loan portfolio following the sale of the French retail banking business (2024: US$100 million gain), and a mark-to-market gain of US$100 million on the sale of the Argentina business

units.translation_target_text: A $100 million fair value loss on Grupo Financiero Galicia's ("Galicia") American depositary receipts received as consideration for the purchase. In 2024, the amount includes proceeds from the sale of the Canadian banking business of $300 million

units.source_text: 4 於2024年，⾦額包括出售阿根廷業務產⽣的10億美元出售虧損，以及撥回匯兌儲備虧損及其他儲備的52億美元虧損。出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務錄得46億美元增益，當中包
units.translation_target_text: 4 In 2024, the amount includes a US$1.0 billion sale loss arising from the sale of the Argentina business and a US$5.2 billion loss reversal of exchange reserve losses and other reserves. The sale of Canadian banking business recorded a gain of US$4.6 billion, including
units.translation_en: 4 In 2024, the amount includes a US$1.0 billion sale loss arising from the sale of the Argentina business and a US$5.2 billion loss reversal of exchange reserve losses and other reserves. The sale of Canadian banking business recorded a gain of US$4.6 billion, including

units.source_text: 括撥回6億美元匯兌儲備虧損及4億美元其他儲備虧損，但不包括外匯對沖增益3億美元（詳情參閱上文註釋2），抵銷前述部分虧損。2023年的數額主要反映限制取
units.translation_target_text: Including the reversal of exchange reserve losses of US$600 million and other reserve losses of US$400 million, but excluding foreign exchange hedging gains of US$300 million (see Note 2 above for details), offsetting part of the aforementioned losses. The amount for 2023 mainly reflects restrictions on withdrawals
units.translation_en: Including the reversal of exchange reserve losses of US$600 million and other reserve losses of US$400 million, but excluding foreign exchange hedging gains of US$300 million (see Note 2 above for details), offsetting part of the aforementioned losses. The amount for 2023 mainly reflects restrictions on withdrawals

units.source_text: 回俄羅斯境內資產的措施所引致的虧損，部分被出售法國零售銀⾏業務的增益抵銷。2022年的⾦額包括就歐洲業務廣泛重組⽽將相關業務分類為持作出售⽤途所產⽣
units.translation_target_text: Losses resulting from measures to repatriate assets in Russia were partially offset by gains from the sale of its French retail banking business. Amounts for 2022 include the classification of the business as held for sale in connection with the broad restructuring of the European business

units.translation_target_text: 5 Includes a net loss on currency positions of US$0.2 billion arising from the application of IAS 29 Financial Reporting in Hyperinflationary Economies (2024: US$1.2 billion; 2023: US$1.7 billion).

units.translation_target_text: 6 In 2025, the amount includes the related accumulated fair value losses of US$1.5 billion following the completion of the sale of the retained homes and certain other loan portfolios of the French operations to a consortium composed of Rothesay Life plc and CCF, and the Group's

units.translation_target_text: Losses of US$1.1 billion (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of Bank of Communications' shareholding. After conducting an impairment test on the book value of the Group's investment in Bank of Communications, we also recognized in the item "Impairment of equity in associates"

units.source_text: 包括期內派付的股息，當中包括於2025年4⽉派付的截⾄2024年12⽉31⽇⽌財政年度第四次股息每股普通股0.36美元，以及截⾄2025年12⽉31⽇⽌財政年度第⼀、第
units.translation_target_text: Includes dividends paid during the period, including the fourth dividend of $0.36 per common share for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, paid in April 2025, and the first and fourth dividends for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025.
units.translation_en: Includes dividends paid during the period, including the fourth dividend of $0.36 per common share for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024, paid in April 2025, and the first and fourth dividends for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025.

units.source_text: ⼆及第三次股息每股普通股0.3美元。於2024年，我們亦於6⽉派付出售加拿⼤業務所得款項之特別股息每股普通股0.21美元。
units.translation_target_text: The second and third dividends are US$0.3 per common share. In 2024, we also paid a special dividend of US$0.21 per common share on proceeds from the sale of our Canadian operations in June.
units.translation_en: The second and third dividends are US$0.3 per common share. In 2024, we also paid a special dividend of US$0.21 per common share on proceeds from the sale of our Canadian operations in June.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The second and third dividends are US$0.3 per common share. In 2024, we also paid a special dividend of US$0.21 per common share on proceeds from the sale of our Canadian operations in June.

units.source_text: 9 於2025、2024及2023年，我們的股息派付比率已就重⼤須予注意項⽬及相關影響作出調整。於2022年，我們的股息派付比率已就法國零售銀⾏業務分類為持作出
units.translation_target_text: 9 In 2025, 2024 and 2023, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for significant noteworthy items and related impacts. In 2022, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for French Retail Banking classified as Hold
units.translation_en: 9 In 2025, 2024 and 2023, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for significant noteworthy items and related impacts. In 2022, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for French Retail Banking classified as Hold

layout_variants.display_en: 9 In 2025, 2024 and 2023, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for significant noteworthy items and related impacts. In 2022, our dividend payout ratio has been adjusted for French Retail Banking classified as Hold

units.source_text: 售⽤途產⽣的虧損、與出售加拿⼤銀⾏業務相關的項⽬以及確認若⼲遞延稅項資產作出調整。2021年並無項⽬作出調整。
units.translation_target_text: Adjustments were made for losses arising from disposals, items related to the sale of the Canadian banking business and the recognition of certain deferred tax assets. No projects will be adjusted in 2021.

units.source_text: 1 總孳息率指就附息資產平均值所賺取之平均年息率（扣除已攤銷溢價及貸款費⽤）。應付利息總額指平均年息⽀出佔附息負債平均值的百分比。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Gross interest rate refers to the average annual interest rate earned on the average of interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premium and loan charges). Total interest payable is the average annual interest expense as a percentage of the average interest-bearing liabilities.
units.translation_en: 1 Gross interest rate refers to the average annual interest rate earned on the average of interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premium and loan charges). Total interest payable is the average annual interest expense as a percentage of the average interest-bearing liabilities.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Gross interest rate refers to the average annual interest rate earned on the average of interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premium and loan charges). Total interest payable is the average annual interest expense as a percentage of the average interest-bearing liabilities.

units.source_text: 2 淨息差指就附息資產平均值所賺取之平均年息率（扣除已攤銷溢價及貸款費⽤）與就附息資⾦平均值所⽀付之平均年息率兩者間之息差。
units.translation_target_text: 2 Net interest margin represents the difference between the average annual interest rate earned on the average interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premiums and loan fees) and the average annual interest rate paid on the average interest-bearing funds.
units.translation_en: 2 Net interest margin represents the difference between the average annual interest rate earned on the average interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premiums and loan fees) and the average annual interest rate paid on the average interest-bearing funds.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Net interest margin represents the difference between the average annual interest rate earned on the average interest-bearing assets (net of amortized premiums and loan fees) and the average annual interest rate paid on the average interest-bearing funds.

units.source_text: 3 淨利息收益率指淨利息收益佔附息資產平均值之按年計算百分比。
units.translation_target_text: 3 Net interest margin refers to the annualized percentage of net interest income to the average value of interest-bearing assets.
units.translation_en: 3 Net interest margin refers to the annualized percentage of net interest income to the average value of interest-bearing assets.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence
